description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the buildstream/buildstream-fedora:latest Docker image and caches the path buildstream-tests/tmp/sources. Include a before_script that sets LANG and LC_ALL to C.UTF-8, clones https://gitlab.com/BuildStream/buildstream.git, runs pip3 install . inside the cloned directory, initializes a new git repository in buildstream-tests, adds the CI repository as origin, fetches, checks out the branch $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME, fetches the specific commit $CI_COMMIT_SHA, and resets hard to FETCH_HEAD. Define an integration_tests job in the default test stage that executes ./run-test.sh --arg --colors test. The pipeline has no additional services, artifacts, or conditional rules.
